suite: BCE v10 — Behavior-Driven Attack Chain Validation

tests.name: incidentSummaries always have .id field
stageCount >= 3 for incidents involving credential_access
inferred stages inserted for mid-stage detections with shallow chains
inferred killChainStages have inferred:true marker
inferred stages have confidence < 80 (lower than observed)
killChainStages have non-empty tacticRole labels
incidentSummaries have progressiveRisk > 0
no single-stage incidents for lateral_movement detections
no single-stage incidents for impact tactic
no single-stage incidents for privilege_escalation
behavioral fingerprinting overrides generic detection for procdump
TACTIC_ADAPTIVE_WINDOWS config defined in engine
chain-aware progressive risk: impact-stage incident has risk >= 70
Windows and Linux detections never fuse into the same incident
full APT chain has ≥5 stages and all expected MITRE techniques
chainGraph.nodes.length matches stageCount
chainGraph.edges present for multi-stage incidents
hasInferredStages flag is accurate (matches actual inferred count)
observedStages + inferredStages = stageCount
incidentSummaries have non-empty rootCauseSummary
dominantIntent is 'attacker' for high-confidence attacker incidents
tacticRole labels cover required lifecycle roles for full APT chain
mitreMappings non-empty for every incident
engine version is CSDE-v10-BCE-Hardened
BCE_MIN_CHAIN_DEPTH=3 enforced for mid-stage tactics
chainValid=true for correctly ordered APT attack sequence
killChainStages have severity field per stage
credential_access detection produces multi-stage incident (not single-stage)
chain name reflects full APT kill chain for full APT scenario
all incidentSummaries have verdict field (TRUE_POSITIVE/FALSE_POSITIVE/PARTIAL)
